app.name: API Bricks SDK
app.one_liner: A multi-protocol SDK suite for integrating CoinAPI and FinFeedAPI financial data services.

screens.name: SDK Selector
screens.purpose: Allows developers to browse and select from available CoinAPI and FinFeedAPI SDK modules by product and protocol.

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist selected SDK configuration or example snippet locally for later use.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add local save functionality for selected SDK examples
week 1: Implement SDK module listing from CoinAPI and FinFeedAPI families
week 1: Integrate links to external documentation hubs
acceptance_tests: User can access FinFeedAPI documentation via embedded link
User can view all CoinAPI SDK modules with their supported protocols
